Raising Helen (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $37,485,528Details
International Box Office $12,356,903
Worldwide Box Office $49,842,431
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,985,597 (29.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.41 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:75.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,717 opening theaters/2,721 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $72,194,351

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 28th, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: June 3rd, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic issues involving teens
Running Time: 119 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Sibling, Sibling Rivalry, Unexpected Families, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Touchstone Pictures, Beacon Pictures, Mandeville Films, Ashok Amritraj
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
